title: Runtime Diagnostic Console
purpose: Implement governance runtime diagnostics console to expose runtime state visibility, surface operational anomalies, reduce debugging friction, and support governance operators.
architectural_constraints: CLI-first implementation with no advanced UI
Must operate using structured telemetry only
Must not bypass governance event bus
acceptance_criteria: Shows checkpoint state and stale locks
Detects runtime drift when heartbeat timeout exceeds 5 minutes
Filters by severity, category, and execution_id

traceability.description: Implemented runtime diagnostic console with health checks, severity filtering, drift detection, and failure summaries

failure_modes.mitigation: Timestamp validation on all queried streams, freshness warnings
Read-only queries, no locks held during display
